title: I Conducted 250+ Technical Interviews as a Senior Developer. Only 50 Made It Through. Here's What I Saw.
metaTitle: I Conducted 250+ Technical Interviews. Only 50 Passed. Here's What I Learned.
description: A senior developer's honest account of conducting 250+ technical interviews and what it revealed about how broken the hiring process really is — and how AI can fix it.
author: Navin Dev
